---
title: "What is this blog?!"
image: phoebe22.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/phoebe-jones-89528a375/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/phoebechar
---

This blog is a part of the Data Visualization class at St. Lawrence University. Each blog post is a short exploration into a new dataset using data visualization skills learned in class to communicate some cool things!
